title: Madmannah #4089
definition:
Madmannah = "dunghill"

 n pr m
 1) a descendant of Caleb

 n pr loc
 2) one of the towns in the south district of Judah
nasbUsage:

 n pr m
 1) a descendant of Caleb

 n pr loc
 2) one of the towns in the south district of Judah

    NASB:  a city in S. Judah, also a desc. of Caleb
